description: OneSignal is a customer engagement platform for sending and automating messaging across push, email, SMS/RCS, in-app messages, and Live Activities. It provides tools for managing users, subscriptions, segmentation, campaigns, and delivery analytics.
summary: OneSignal exposes a REST API at https://api.onesignal.com and a beta MCP server; both use OneSignal-issued API keys, with app-scoped and organization-scoped keys for REST and an app API key for MCP.
